text.title: vui-market-context Failure Modes
text.summary: 4 antipatterns repeatedly observed in real deployments. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Decision cites 2022 Alexa Skills numbers; reality in 2026 is different.
antipattern.root-cause: LLM trained on pre-2024 data; author did not re-pull.

antipattern.symptom: Product depends solely on Alexa Skills; Amazon restricts category mid-2025; product stranded.
antipattern.fix: Add Matter / Home Assistant / custom-LLM fallback; document risk.

antipattern.symptom: App voice built on Siri Shortcuts despite SiriKit limitations; custom-LLM Realtime API rejected without evaluation.
antipattern.root-cause: Author treated vendor platforms as default.
antipattern.fix: Score custom-LLM-voice on same matrix; let merit decide.

antipattern.symptom: Product ships only Alexa-certified; user complaints from Google/Apple households.
antipattern.fix: Add Matter as primary; Alexa / Google / Apple all consume Matter.
